name: Distill documents with MySQL and Outlook in real time

options.systemPromptTemplate: You are a precise extraction engine. Only extract values present in the text.

parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf06963-document`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Collect Raw Text

### Collect Raw Text

Shapes the item: writes `content`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Extract Structured Fields

### Extract Structured Fields

Pulls structured fields (docId, title, sourceUrl) out of free text using a strict extraction prompt.

Ports: тСатЖТ All Required Fields Found? ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЪа failures exit via the error rail

### Google Gemini Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `models/gemini-2.5-flash`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Extract Structured Fields** as `languageModel`

ЁЯФС Google AI API key

### All Required Fields Found?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.output?.docId }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: тСатЖТ Upsert into MySQL ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Queue for Manual Review

### Upsert into MySQL

Inserts a row into the MySQL table using fields auto-mapped from the incoming item.

Ports: тСатЖТ Merge Review Paths ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС MySQL connection

### Queue for Manual Review

Sends an email via Microsoft Outlook тАФ recipient comes from the item's `email` field.

Ports: тСатЖТ Merge Review Paths ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Microsoft OAuth2

### Merge Review Paths

Rejoins 2 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Fingerprint for Idempotency

### Fingerprint for Idempotency

Custom JavaScript: Build a stable idempotency key per document (djb2 hash, no deps)

Next: Drop Already-Processed Items

### Drop Already-Processed Items

Cross-execution dedupe: remembers keys it has processed before and drops repeats тАФ the idempotency guard.

Next: Enrich with Reference Data

### Enrich with Reference Data

GET https://enrichment.example.com/v2/lookup тАФ retries 3├Ч with backoff on failure.

Ports: тСатЖТ Fold In Enrichment Fields ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС API key / bearer for the target API

### Fold In Enrichment Fields

Shapes the item: writes `enrichedAt`, `enrichmentSource`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Serialize Run Output (CSV)

### Serialize Run Output (CSV)

Serializes items to a CSV binary file.

Next: Archive Row Snapshot

### Archive Row Snapshot

Inserts a row into the MySQL table using fields auto-mapped from the incoming item.

Ports: тСатЖТ Stamp Completion Time ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС MySQL connection

### Stamp Completion Time

Stamps `completedAt` with the current time for auditing.

Next: Persist Run Metadata

### Persist Run Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record тАФ searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

### Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

Appends a new row to 'Document Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: тСатЖТ Send Summary to Slack ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

### Send Summary to Slack

Posts a message to Slack (`#knowledge`) тАФ a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Slack

### Escalate Failure to Slack

Posts a message to Slack (`#knowledge`) тАФ a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

Next: Park in Dead-Letter Queue

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

### Park in Dead-Letter Queue

Inserts a row into the MySQL table using fields auto-mapped from the incoming item.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ ЁЯФС MySQL connection

# Distill documents with MySQL and Outlook in real time

**Pattern:** AI Summarize & Route ┬╖ **Level:** Production ┬╖ **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Distill documents with MySQL and Outlook in real time. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual q&a is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook тЖТ Collect Raw Text тЖТ Extract Structured Fields тЖТ All Required Fields Found? тЖТ Upsert into MySQL тЖТ Merge Review Paths тЖТ Fingerprint for Idempotency тЖТ тАж

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai summarize & route without manual effort
- Anyone automating q&a in ai
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Responds in seconds
- Runs 24/7 in the background
- Has retries and error handling built in

## Before first run
Connect credentials: API key / bearer for the target API; Google AI API key; Google OAuth2 / service account; Microsoft OAuth2; MySQL connection; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: ЁЯЯж entry ┬╖ ЁЯЯк AI ┬╖ ЁЯЯл actions ┬╖ тмЬ utilities ┬╖ ЁЯЯй outputs ┬╖ ЁЯЯе error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath тАФ read those before editing.

## Try it now
Sample data is pinned on the trigger тАФ hit **Execute Workflow** to watch it flow through every node before connecting any real credentials. Unpin the trigger (right-click тЖТ Unpin) when you're ready to go live.

## Design decisions

The required-fields check runs *before* the write, not after тАФ an incomplete extraction goes to manual review instead of landing a half-populated record in the system of record. Upsert (not plain create) means re-processing the same document twice updates the existing record instead of duplicating it.

## Practice exercises

Already production-grade тАФ deepen your understanding:

1. Add a new field to the extraction schema and mark it required тАФ watch more documents route to manual review.
2. Feed it a document deliberately missing a required field and trace exactly where it ends up.
3. Change the extraction target (e.g. invoice тЖТ contract fields) and adjust the upsert key to match.

## ЁЯЫЯ Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3├Ч with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail тЖТ context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Failures are also parked in a dead-letter queue for replay. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## ЁЯФР Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials тАФ never in node parameters.

## ЁЯдЦ AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens тАФ keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## ЁЯЫа Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see ЁЯФС lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your q&a process. Every node card explains its role тАФ safe to extend at any marked branch.
